recruitment.blocked_state: Companions cannot be changed during events, festivals, menus, or minigames.
recruitment.unsupported: {{npc}} is not a safe companion target right now.
recruitment.request_sent: Sent a companion request for {{npc}} to the host.
management.dismiss_all_confirm: Dismiss all companions from your squad?
commands.no_followers: No available companion can take that command.
tasks.need_axe: Equip an axe before asking a companion to chop.
tasks.need_pickaxe: Equip a pickaxe before asking a companion to mine.
tasks.bee_flower_protected: That flower is protected because a nearby bee house depends on it.
squad.inventory_disabled_empty: Squad inventory is disabled and empty.
squad.withdraw_complete: All squad items were moved to your inventory.
squad.withdraw_partial: Some squad items stayed stored because your inventory is full.
companion.panel.title: Companions
companion.panel.work_hint: Hover an order to preview what the companion will do.
companion.panel.recall_hover: Bring {{npc}} back to you and resume following.
companion.quick.work_hover: Send {{npc}} to work nearby, focusing on {{specialty}}.
companion.quick.configured_autonomy_hove: {{npc}} is working through an Autonomous task mode. Click to switch to the {{specialty}} specialty.
companion.quick.work_enabled_tasks: Companion tasks were enabled. {{npc}} will work nearby, focusing on {{specialty}}.
companion.quick.recall_sent: Sent a request to the host to recall {{npc}}.
companion.quick.more_hover: {{count}} companions hidden. Open the full panel.
wheel.hint: Click; right-click or wheel key closes.
wheel.no_target: None of your companions is available on this map.
wheel.no_context: Point at an NPC, supported resource, or safe empty ground.
wheel.no_safe_ground: That spot isn't empty, safe, and reachable.
wheel.no_worker_available: No companion can safely reach that target right now.
wheel.remote_crop_unsupported: Farmhand-owned companions can't harvest crops safely yet; Stardew would credit the host.
wheel.sent_partial: Sent {{count}} of {{total}} companions to the {{target}}; the others had no safe adjacent tile.
wheel.sent_to_wait: Sent {{npc}} to wait at the selected spot.
wheel.arrived_to_wait: {{npc}} is waiting at the selected spot.
wheel.wait_move_failed: {{npc}} couldn't reach the spot and is waiting where they stopped.
wheel.wait_move_cancelled: {{npc}} became unavailable, so the movement order was cancelled.
companion.preview.inactive: turn on a work command to preview a target
companion.preview.planning: planning work on the next update
companion.preview.disabled_after_click: click would turn this command off
companion.preview.work_modes_disabled: enable lumbering or mining before starting nearby work
companion.inventory.title: {{npc}} inventory
multiplayer.command_stale: That command used an outdated companion view. The panel was refreshed; please try again.
multiplayer.command_failed: The host could not complete that companion command. Check the SMAPI log for details.
companion.task_failure.target_reserved: target is reserved by another companion
companion.task_failure.protected_target: target is protected and cannot be changed safely
companion.task_failure.bee_flower_protec: flower is protected for a nearby bee house
companion.task_failure.inventory_full_wo: inventory was full, reward dropped nearby
companion.task_failure.unexpected_error: task was cancelled after an unexpected content error
companion.task_failure.remote_harvest_un: farmhand crop harvesting is disabled to preserve the correct item and XP owner
companion.task_failure.npc_missing: NPC content is currently unavailable; companion data was preserved
state.unavailable: Pelican Companions found incompatible or damaged save data. Its features are disabled for this session to prevent item or world-state loss; check the SMAPI log.
companion.movement_debug.title: Movement debug - {{formation}}
companion.skill.progression_disabled: Companion progression is disabled in the mod settings.
skills.combat_1.name: Steady Strike
skills.combat_1.description: Increases companion combat damage by 10 percent.
skills.combat_2.name: Finisher
skills.combat_2.description: Adds another 10 percent combat damage bonus.
skills.lumber_1.name: Lumberjack's Arm
skills.lumber_1.description: Adds one effective upgrade level to the axe used by this companion, up to Iridium.
skills.lumber_2.name: Quick Chop
skills.lumber_2.description: Reduces wood hit cooldown by 10 percent.
skills.lumber_3.name: Clean Cut
skills.lumber_3.description: Adds a chance for one extra wood when a companion clears a full tree.
skills.mining_1.name: Stonebreaker
skills.mining_1.description: Adds one effective upgrade level to the pickaxe used by this companion, up to Iridium.
skills.mining_2.name: Miner's Rhythm
skills.mining_2.description: Reduces mining hit cooldown by 10 percent.
skills.mining_3.name: Eye for Ore
skills.mining_3.description: Adds a small chance for one extra ore when this companion breaks an ore node.
skills.utility_1.name: Quick Step
skills.utility_1.description: Retries blocked paths toward work targets 20 percent sooner.
skills.utility_2.name: Task Focus
skills.utility_2.description: Increases work search radius by one tile for this companion.
skills.utility_3.name: Safe Return
skills.utility_3.description: Lets this companion return to the player sooner after tasks.
dialogue.Recruit.generic: I'll come along for a while.
dialogue.Idle.night: We should keep an eye on the time.
dialogue.Mining.generic: That rock did not stand a chance.
dialogue.Fishing_Waiting.generic: I'll wait quietly while you fish.
dialogue.FriendshipTooLow.generic: Maybe after we know each other better.
multiplayer.version_mismatch: Pelican Companions version mismatch: local {{local}}, remote {{remote}}. Multiplayer companion features may be limited.
config.overview: Recommended start: keep the detailed quick HUD enabled, use the companion panel for per-NPC work, and lower the HUD row limit if it covers other mods.
config.section.controls.description: Keyboard shortcuts for recruiting, commands, inventory, and the full companion panel.
config.section.interface.description: HUD and feedback options. The detailed quick HUD shows names, status, level, work state, and inventory pressure on your chosen side of the screen.
config.quickActionWheelKey.name: Quick-action wheel key
config.quickActionWheelKey.description: Open contextual actions for the NPC, supported resource, or safe empty ground under the cursor.
config.recruitKey.name: Recruit / manage key
config.recruitKey.description: Press near an NPC or pet to recruit them or open their companion management actions.
config.manualTaskKey.name: Manual task key
config.manualTaskKey.description: Press while aiming at a safe task target, such as dry crop soil.
config.openSquadInventoryKey.name: Open squad inventory key
config.openSquadInventoryKey.description: Open the shared squad inventory summary and withdrawal action.
config.tasksToggleKey.name: Task toggle key
config.tasksToggleKey.description: Enable or disable companion tasks while keeping followers active.
config.openCompanionPanelKey.name: Open companion panel key
config.openCompanionPanelKey.description: Open the graphical companion panel with levels, skills, inventories, and work toggles.
config.recallAllCompanionsKey.name: Recall all companions key
config.recallAllCompanionsKey.descriptio: Optional key to cancel local companion work and bring all of them back to following. Leave blank to disable.
config.showCompanionQuickHud.name: Show companion quick HUD
config.showCompanionQuickHud.description: Show the companion dock for quick work, recall, and panel commands.
config.companionQuickHudMode.name: Quick HUD layout
config.companionQuickHudMode.description: Detailed shows name, status, and level. Compact keeps only portraits and action buttons.
config.companionQuickHudSide.name: Quick HUD side
config.companionQuickHudSide.description: Choose which side of the screen holds the companion dock. The default is left.
config.companionQuickHudMaxRows.name: Quick HUD max rows
config.companionQuickHudMaxRows.descript: Maximum companion rows shown before the overflow button opens the full panel.
config.companionFormationMode.name: Companion formation
config.companionFormationMode.descriptio: Controls preferred follow offsets for companions near the player.
config.showCompanionMovementDebug.name: Show movement debug
config.showCompanionMovementDebug.descri: Show optional movement diagnostics for pathing, target tiles, distance, and recovery.
config.useSquadInventory.name: Use squad inventory
config.useSquadInventory.description: Store task outputs in a shared inventory instead of routing them directly to the player.
config.useVanillaDialogueUi.name: Use vanilla dialogue UI
config.useVanillaDialogueUi.description: Use Stardew Valley's native question dialogue to manage companions. Disable this to open the graphical companion panel instead.
config.enableCompanionProgression.name: Enable companion progression
config.enableCompanionProgression.descri: Allow companions to gain XP, level up, and unlock skill tree nodes.
config.companionInventorySlots.name: Companion inventory slots
config.companionInventorySlots.descripti: Number of item stacks each companion can carry. This PRD clamps the value to 10.
config.companionWorkRadius.name: Companion work radius
config.companionWorkRadius.description: Maximum tiles from the player where work toggles may choose wood or mining targets.
config.companionWorkReturnDistance.name: Companion return distance
config.companionWorkReturnDistance.descr: Distance from the player where a working companion cancels the task and returns.
config.showCompanionLevelUpHud.name: Show level-up HUD
config.showCompanionLevelUpHud.descripti: Show a HUD message when a companion levels up.
config.friendshipRequirement.name: Required hearts
config.friendshipRequirement.description: Minimum hearts needed before an NPC can be recruited. Spouses and pets bypass this.
config.friendshipPointsPerHour.name: Friendship per hour
config.friendshipPointsPerHour.descripti: Friendship points awarded each in-game hour to recruited villagers.
config.maxSquadSize.name: Max squad size
config.maxSquadSize.description: Maximum companions one player can recruit at the same time.
config.recruitAllNpcs.name: Recruit all NPCs
config.recruitAllNpcs.description: Allow broader recruitment for non-friendable NPCs when they are safe targets.
config.disableInteraction.name: Disable companion interaction
config.disableInteraction.description: Controls whether normal talking or gifting should be avoided for companions. This setting does not change normal interaction in 0.2.0.
config.disableTrashRummagingReaction.des: Controls companion reactions to trash rummaging. This setting has no effect in 0.2.0.
config.enableCommunication.name: Enable communication
config.dialogueCooldownSeconds.name: Dialogue cooldown
config.dialogueCooldownSeconds.descripti: Minimum real seconds between ambient companion lines.
config.enableIdleAnimations.name: Enable idle animations
config.enableIdleAnimations.description: Allow data-driven idle animation hooks when supported by future content.
config.enableGathering.name: Enable gathering
config.enableGathering.description: Controls routing for gathered items. Destructive gathering remains conservative in this build.
config.attackingMode.name: Attacking mode
config.harvestingMode.name: Harvesting mode
config.harvestingMode.description: Controls ripe crop harvesting assistance. Companions use Stardew Valley's standard harvest behavior, preserving normal produce, bonus drops, regrowth, and effects.
config.protectBeehouseFlowers.name: Beehouse flower protection
config.protectBeehouseFlowers.descriptio: Keep harvest-ready flowers within this many tiles of a bee house untouched. Set to zero to disable protection.
config.foragingMode.name: Foraging mode
config.lumberingMode.name: Lumbering mode
config.lumberingMode.description: Controls tree-chopping assistance. Autonomous scans for safe targets without a directive; directives and specialties can still focus the search. Companions use standard axe behavior, preserving normal wood, sap, seed, and other drops.
config.miningMode.name: Mining mode
config.miningMode.description: Controls rock and ore mining assistance. Autonomous scans for safe targets without a directive; directives and specialties can still focus the search. Companions use standard pickaxe and stone-destruction behavior, preserving normal drops and effects.
config.wateringMode.name: Watering mode
config.wateringMode.description: Controls crop watering assistance. Mimicking waters another nearby dry tile when the player uses a watering can, and the manual task key also works. Autonomous searches for dry crops on its own.
config.fishingMode.name: Fishing mode
config.pettingMode.name: Petting mode
config.pettingMode.description: Controls animal-petting assistance. Companions use the standard petting action, preserving friendship gains and normal animal state.
config.shearingMode.name: Shearing mode
config.milkingMode.name: Milking mode
config.milkingMode.description: Controls cow and goat milking assistance.
config.enableRiding.name: Enable riding
config.enableRiding.description: Reserved setting for horse-riding presentation. Current behavior keeps normal follow offsets.
config.enableSitting.name: Enable sitting
config.enableSitting.description: Reserved setting for sitting presentation. Sitting is not available in 0.2.0.
config.warpHomeOnDisconnect.name: Dismiss on disconnect
config.warpHomeOnDisconnect.description: If enabled, a disconnected player's following companions are dismissed by the host. Explicit Waiting orders are preserved.
config.parkTimeoutMinutes.name: Park timeout minutes
config.parkTimeoutMinutes.description: Real minutes before parked disconnected companions are dismissed. Zero disables timeout.
